title: Touhou Origins: Unofficial Port
description: Unofficial 1.20.1 backport of Touhou Origins, originally made for 1.20.2.
body:
This is an unofficial  1.20.1 backport of Touhou Origins, originally created for Fabric 1.20.2 by Maxmani and contributors.

Touhou Origins adds [Touhou Project](https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Touhou_Wiki) inspired origins for the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod, each with its own abilities, drawbacks, and playstyle. For the original project page, full origin list, and general information, see the original Touhou Origins page:

[Touhou Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-origins)


Some useful info.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A mod for the Fabric Loader that adds more origins to the Origins mod inspired by the Touhou Project series.

### Included origins


- Earth Rabbit
- Moon Rabbit
- Kappa
- Celestial
- Fairy
- Ghost
- Wolf Tengu
- Bake-Danuki
- Satori
- Oni
- Vengeful Spirit
- Oarfish
- Nue
- Crow Tengu
- Jiang Shi
- Vampire
- Amanojaku
- Haniwa
- Yuki-Onna
- Hell Raven
- Kurayami
- Tsukumogami

### About Shikigami

Beginning with version 2.0.0, players can become a shikigami of another player. This works with any origin and provides an additional set of powers.

To avoid compatibility issues, Touhou Origins provides two keybinds exclusively for shikigami, which are unbound by default.

</details>



This project is independently maintained and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original authors. Please report issues with this version here, not to the original archived project.



## Credits

Original Touhou Origins by Maxmani and contributors.  
Forge port/backport maintained by me.

This is a fan work based on Touhou Project. Touhou Project and its characters are the property of Team Shanghai Alice / ZUN.
